canonical_definition: The Segment Anything Model (SAM by Kirillov et al., 2023), used as an external tool within an evaluation protocol to identify salient image regions for automatic visual cropping.
papers: MLLMs Know Where to Look: Training-free Perception of Small Visual Details with Multimodal LLMs
ZooProbe: A Data Engine for Evaluating, Exploring, and Evolving Large-scale Training Data for Multimodal LLMs
